---
title: "multiple dispatch"
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=.@"]
---

# multiple dispatch

Which is the key step to optimization of dynamic languages.

```{julia}
f(x::Int64, y::Int64) = x + y
f(x::Float64, y::Float64) = x - y
f(1, 1)
f(1., 1.)
```
